description_long: This is a modern, two-story suburban house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front features a double garage, a covered porch with columns, and a landscaped garden bed with flowers and shrubs. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and includes a swimming pool, a small playhouse, and a grassy area. The exterior is primarily finished in white with some gray and beige accents, and the driveway leads directly to the garage. The house is designed for family living, with multiple entry points and outdoor recreational spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, landscaped front yard, and a fenced backyard with a pool and playhouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, covered porch with columns, landscaped garden, and main driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered porch, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard with the pool and playhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, grassy area, and playhouse, as well as large rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garden beds, and the side of the house with additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a single main door adjacent to the garage
